description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set on a rectangular plot with a landscaped front and backyard. The house features a flat roof, large glass windows, and a clean, geometric design with white and wood-toned exterior finishes. The front yard includes a circular driveway lined with palm trees, leading up to the main entrance. The backyard is equipped with a swimming pool, surrounded by additional palm trees and green lawn areas. The house appears to have multiple entry points, open patio spaces, and a seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing open space and natural light.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a circular driveway, and a backyard pool, surrounded by palm trees and green lawns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, circular driveway, and landscaped front yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, large windows, and backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, and secondary entry points, with the driveway visible in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and the house's geometric layout with palm trees along the perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide door, minimal steps, and a covered porch area, accessed via a circular driveway lined with palm trees.
